title: Riverside Sensor Mesh: Recovering the Causal Wiring of an Environmental Monitoring Network
strategies: Empty graph (do-nothing lower bound; SHD = number of true edges)
Marginal-correlation skeleton with index-order orientation (indirect-path false positives, coin-flip orientation)
Precision-matrix (partial-correlation) skeleton + BFS layering orientation anchored on the known forcing/weather-driver nodes, with a variance-rank tie-breaker
Score-based / constraint-based DAG search that combines partial correlations, the forcing-node orientation constraint, and a residual-independence ordering to fight heteroscedasticity
